subtitle.en: Premium heavyweight T-shirt manufacturer in China. 240–300 GSM cotton, oversized fit, custom printing & washing. Low MOQ, fast sampling.

title.zh: Custom 500 GSM Heavyweight Oversized Hoodie for Streetwear Brands
title.en: Custom 500 GSM Heavyweight Oversized Hoodie for Streetwear Brands

content.zh: Developed for premium streetwear labels, this custom oversized black hoodie is constructed from 500 GSM heavyweight brushed fleece, available in 100% combed cotton or 80% cotton / 20% polyester.
content.en: Developed for premium streetwear labels, this custom oversized black hoodie is constructed from 500 GSM heavyweight brushed fleece, available in 100% combed cotton or 80% cotton / 20% polyester.
